hooks.command: cmd=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.command'); echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'git commit' || exit 0; changes=$(git diff --name-only HEAD 2>/dev/null; git diff --cached --name-only 2>/dev/null; git status --porcelain 2>/dev/null | awk '{print $2}'); echo "$changes" | grep -q '^frontend/src/' || exit 0; echo "$changes" | grep -q '^static/dist/' && exit 0; printf '{"continue":false,"stopReason":"Frontend source changed but static/dist/ not rebuilt. Run: npm run build"}\n'

cmd=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.command'); echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'git commit' || exit 0; v=$(sed -n 's/^VERSION = "\(.*\)"/\1/p' src/version.py 2>/dev/null); [ -z "$v" ] && exit 0; rv=$(sed -n 's/^# SpotiPi (v\(.*\))/\1/p' Readme.MD 2>/dev/null); av=$(sed -n 's/^# SpotiPi Agent Guidelines (v\(.*\))/\1/p' AGENTS.md 2>/dev/null); [ "$v" = "$rv" ] && [ "$v" = "$av" ] && exit 0; printf '{"continue":false,"stopReason":"Version mismatch! version.py=%s Readme.MD=%s AGENTS.md=%s — sync before committing."}\n' "$v" "$rv" "$av"

cmd=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.command'); echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '^git push' || exit 0; printf '{"continue":false,"stopReason":"Direct git push blocked — use /ship for SpotiPi (runs quality gates, version check, doc sync)."}\n'
